query:
insert into tachyon_apps_delivery.shipping_order (
            id,
            delivery_slip_id,
            contract_id,
            shipping_status,
            expected_shipping_date,
            expected_delivery_date,
            expected_delivery_time_slot,
            timezone,
            shipping_destination_id

            )
            values (
            ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?
            )
